languages.text: "Теперь поговорим о деле. Кто ты так{mf|ой|ая}, и откуда у тебя столь высокая осведомленность о моих делах?" {n}Наследница выглядит расслабленной, но ее взгляд прикован к вашему лицу.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: играет этюд DL_JuvennaSuspicionAgent и не играет этюд DL_TraitorsConspiracy
играет этюд DL_JuvennaSuspicionAgent и не играет этюд DL_TraitorsConspiracy

languages.text: "Now let us speak plainly. Who are you, and how do you possess such intimate knowledge of my affairs?" {n}She appears relaxed, but her gaze is fixed on your face.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Теперь поговорим о деле. Кто ты так{mf|ой|ая}, и откуда у тебя столь высокая осведомленность о моих делах?" {n}Наследница выглядит расслабленной, но ее взгляд прикован к вашему лицу.{/n}

"Now let us speak plainly. Who are you, and how do you possess such intimate knowledge of my affairs?" {n}She appears relaxed, but her gaze is fixed on your face.{/n}

languages.text: «Hablemos con franqueza. ¿Quién es y cómo conoce mis movimientos con tanto detalle?». {n}Aparenta estar relajada, pero su mirada no se aparta de tu rostro.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now let us speak plainly. Who are you, and how do you possess such intimate knowledge of my affairs?" {n}She appears relaxed, but her gaze is fixed on your face.{/n}

languages.text: “现在可以打开天窗说亮话了。你是谁？为什么会对我的事了如指掌？”{n}她看似从容，目光却紧盯着你的脸。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now let us speak plainly. Who are you, and how do you possess such intimate knowledge of my affairs?" {n}She appears relaxed, but her gaze is fixed on your face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “现在可以打开天窗说亮话了。你是谁？为什么会对我的事了如指掌？”{n}她看似从容，目光却紧盯着你的脸。{/n}

languages.text: « Parlons peu, mais parlons bien. Qui êtes-vous, et comment pouvez-vous en savoir autant sur mes affaires ? » {n}Si elle affiche une expression détendue, son regard reste rivé en permanence sur votre visage.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now let us speak plainly. Who are you, and how do you possess such intimate knowledge of my affairs?" {n}She appears relaxed, but her gaze is fixed on your face.{/n}

languages.text: "Şimdi açık konuşalım. Kimsin sen ve işlerim hakkında bu kadar mahrem bilgiye nasıl sahipsin?" {n}Rahat görünse de bakışlarını suratından çevirmiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now let us speak plainly. Who are you, and how do you possess such intimate knowledge of my affairs?" {n}She appears relaxed, but her gaze is fixed on your face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi açık konuşalım. Kimsin sen ve işlerim hakkında bu kadar mahrem bilgiye nasıl sahipsin?" {n}Rahat görünse de bakışlarını suratından çevirmiyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Lass uns jetzt offen reden. Wer seid Ihr und woher wisst Ihr so genau über meine Angelegenheiten Bescheid?" {n}Sie wirkt gelassen, lässt dich aber nicht aus den Augen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now let us speak plainly. Who are you, and how do you possess such intimate knowledge of my affairs?" {n}She appears relaxed, but her gaze is fixed on your face.{/n}

languages.text: 「それでは、率直に話しましょう。あなたは誰で、私の事柄について、なぜこのような親密な知識を持っているのですか？」{n}彼女はリラックスしているように見えるが、彼女の視線はあなたの顔に釘付けになっている.{/n}
